title: aster dubius var. angustifolius
intro: Aster dubius var. angustifolius, a lesser-known variant of the Aster dubius plant, is a flowering plant species native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Aster dubius var. angustifolius is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
